title: Build 7-gate risk pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Gate 1 - System Halt: Check kill switch / paper mode
Gate 2 - Daily Loss Limit: Block if daily P&L < -5%
Gate 3 - Weekly Loss Limit: Block if weekly P&L < -10%
Gate 4 - News Window: Block if high-impact news within 30 min
Gate 5 - Spread Check: Block if spread > 2x historical average
Gate 6 - Correlation Check: Reduce 50% if correlation >0.7, block if >0.85
Gate 7 - Minimum Confidence: Block if <65, reduce 30% if 65-75, full if >=75
All gates return pass/fail with detailed reason
Risk team has absolute veto power
